tags.A: Subjective credit rating level: the counterparty is reliable, and you trust them unconditionally.
tags.About: Additional account information: who you are, what you do, and what you consider important to share.
tags.Ambassador: A mark indicating a representative or ambassador role of the account in a community, project, or organization.
tags.B: A creditworthy person you personally trust and are willing to share obligations with in a limited scope.
tags.C: A mild public claim against a counterparty regarding debt or other obligations.
tags.Client: A frequent, or simply a currently relevant, client.
tags.Collaboration: Joint work on a shared goal where both parties make a comparable contribution.
tags.Contractor: A contractor in long-term working relations with a more independent role than an employee.
tags.D: A strong negative assessment: the counterparty has serious breached obligations or is in default.
tags.Dislike: A negative personal assessment or expression of antipathy toward the account.
tags.Divorce: A record of termination of marital, guardianship, or other close paired relationships.
tags.Employee: An employee in established long-term employment relations.
tags.Employer: An employer in established long-term relations.
tags.Expert: A mark of the account's expert competence in a specific field.
tags.FactionMember: Indicates affiliation with a faction of the Montelibero Association.
tags.Friend: A declaration of friendly attitude toward the account.
tags.Guardian: A legally capable person acting as guardian and authorized representative of the other party.
tags.IAmVolunteerFor: Indicates that the sender voluntarily helps this account, project, or organization.
tags.mtl_delegate: Vote delegation in the context of the MTL Fund.
tags.tfm_delegate: Vote delegation in the context of the Third Fund.
tags.mtla_a_delegate: Vote delegation in the Assembly of the Montelibero Association.
tags.mtla_c_delegate: Vote delegation in the Council of the Montelibero Association.
tags.LeaderForMTLA: Indicates an organization representative, leader, manager, or director.
tags.Like: A positive personal assessment or expression of sympathy toward the account.
tags.Love: An expression of strong personal affection toward the account.
tags.Member: Indicates that the account is a member of a community, association, or specific structure.
tags.MyGuide: A person who helps the sender get up to speed in a new field or environment by sharing experience and answering questions.
tags.MyJudge: A preferred judge or arbitrator for resolving disputes and conflict situations.
tags.MyMediator: A preferred mediator for peaceful dispute resolution.
tags.MyMentee: A person whom the sender helps get up to speed in a new field or environment by sharing experience and answering questions.
tags.MyPart: The referenced account is a part, participant, or subdivision of the source account.
tags.Name: Account name.
tags.OneFamily: A declaration of a close family relationship with the referenced person.
tags.Owner: The account referenced by the tag owns the source account by 95% or more.
tags.OwnerMajority: The account referenced by the tag owns the source account by 25-95%.
tags.OwnerMinority: The account referenced by the tag owns the source account by less than 25%.
tags.OwnershipFull: The account referenced by the tag belongs to the source account by 95% or more.
tags.OwnershipMajority: The account referenced by the tag belongs to the source account by 25-95%.
tags.OwnershipMinority: The account referenced by the tag belongs to the source account by less than 25%.
tags.Partnership: A long-term partnership where parties regularly interact as equal counterparties.
tags.PartOf: The source account is a part, participant, or subdivision of the referenced account.
tags.ProgramCoordinator: Coordinator of an MTLA activity program.
tags.RecommendForVerification: A recommendation for the account to pass Association verification.
tags.RecommendToMTLA: A recommendation of the account for participation in MTLA or related Association processes.
tags.ResidentAR: A mark related to confirming residency in Argentina (AR).
tags.ResidentGE: A mark related to confirming residency in Georgia (GE).
tags.ResidentME: A mark related to confirming residency in Montenegro (ME).
tags.ResidentPL: A mark related to confirming residency in Poland (PL).
tags.ResidentRS: A mark related to confirming residency in Serbia (RS).
tags.ResidentRU: A mark related to confirming residency in Russia (RU).
tags.ResidentUA: A mark related to confirming residency in Ukraine (UA).
tags.Spouse: A de facto spouse in the civil-law sense.
tags.Sympathy: An indication of romantic sympathy or relationship interest.
tags.TimeTokenCode: The code of a personal time token issued by the account or its linked issuer.
tags.TimeTokenIssuer: A reference tag that points to an alternative issuer of the time token instead of the account itself.
tags.Vendor: A supplier or performer working for the referenced client.
tags.VerifiedByRecommendation: A sign that the account was verified based on recommendations.
tags.Ward: A ward in relation to the account indicated as guardian.
tags.Website: A full URL of a personal or corporate website, social media resource, or similar page.
tags.WelcomeGuest: An invitation to visit or a statement of readiness to host the referenced person.
